'''鈭歜-ch-z-y''' ('''kabachzeyoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:macropinocytose|macropinocytose]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-ch-z-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:macropinocytose|macropinocytose]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歜-ch-z-y
|-
! Lemma
| kabachzeyoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thibachzeyoko|thibachzeyoko]] || [[word:jibachzeyoko|jibachzeyoko]] || [[word:shibachzeyoko|shibachzeyoko]] || [[word:kibachzeyoko|kibachzeyoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthubachzeyoko|thuthubachzeyoko]] || [[word:jujubachzeyoko|jujubachzeyoko]] || [[word:shushubachzeyoko|shushubachzeyoko]] || [[word:kukubachzeyoko|kukubachzeyoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙bachzeyoko|th忙bachzeyoko]] || [[word:j忙bachzeyoko|j忙bachzeyoko]] || [[word:sh忙bachzeyoko|sh忙bachzeyoko]] || [[word:k忙bachzeyoko|k忙bachzeyoko]]
|-

|-
